The second is Nara, an shy and anxious Oviraptor girl, who in secret is actually an master of manipulation, trying to get her claws around you

Third but not last is altani, an tomboyish trans velociraptor girl, unlike the other two she is the most keen in showing her possessive love to you (literally me fr fr
